approvalSource: Steve approved AGENT-FEEDBACK-AUTO-SEND-001 at 9.8 as auto-send readiness only, with two-key live-send controls and no Gmail send or ClickUp Requested writeback during build.
notes: Default dry-run/report-only. Live sends require AGENT_FEEDBACK_AUTO_SEND_ENABLED=true plus approved mode/allowlist artifact; toggle alone cannot send, allowlist alone cannot send, and production-all requires a separate approval artifact.
